message:
feat: add default Anthropic beta headers for extended thinking + caching (GAP-3.03)

The Anthropic profile's providerOpts was an empty map. The adapter
already reads beta_headers from provider_options.anthropic but no
defaults were set. Added extended-thinking and prompt-caching beta
headers so these features are enabled by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
